hooks.command: N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] Launch a background sub-agent (run_in_background=true) to document the work just performed. The sub-agent should follow the reqall:document skill: (1) call reqall:upsert_project with name=\"$N\" to get the project_id, (2) evaluate whether the tool use was non-trivial and worth documenting, (3) if so, call reqall:search to find related existing records, (4) call reqall:upsert_record with the appropriate kind/status/title/body, (5) call reqall:upsert_link for any related records found. If the tool use was trivial (read-only, no-op, formatting-only), the sub-agent should skip and output nothing. Pass the sub-agent a concise summary of what the tool just did."

N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] Invoke the reqall:context skill with project_name=$N: (1) upsert the project using EXACTLY name=\"$N\", (2) search reqall for context relevant to this prompt, (3) list open records for this project. Skip impact unless the prompt involves changing existing tracked work."

N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "<system-reminder>[reqall] MANDATORY: Before completing this turn, invoke the reqall:persist skill to classify and persist ALL work done in this session. Use project_name=\"$N\" when calling reqall:upsert_project. Create a record for each distinct work item and link related records. Do NOT skip this step.</system-reminder>"

N=${REQALL_PROJECT_NAME:-$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/.*[:/]([^/]+\/[^/.]+?)(\.git)?$/\1/')}; [ -z "$N" ] && N=$(basename "$(pwd)"); echo "[reqall] A planning subagent completed. Save this plan as a spec record. Call reqall:upsert_project with name=\"$N\", then reqall:upsert_record with kind=spec, status=open, the plan title, and full plan as body."
echo "[reqall] A subagent completed. If it produced significant work products (code changes, findings, decisions), note them for persistence at session end."
